# Sophos: Defeat Cyberattacks with AI-Native Security
> Sophos is a global enterprise cybersecurity company that helps organizations Defeat Cyberattacks with resilient AI-native protection, an elite team of threat hunters, and advanced defense across MDR, endpoint, firewall, email, and cloud—all powered by world-class technology and real-world expertise.

**Named a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Endpoint Protection Platforms 16 times.**

**The only vendor recognized as a Gartner® Customers’ Choice for Endpoint Protection, Network Firewalls, Mobile Threats, and MDR—trusted by over 600,000+ customers worldwide.**

## Products and Solutions
## Cloud Security
- [Cloud workload protection](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/cloud-native-security/cloud-workload-protection): Secure cloud growth by reducing your attack surface and integrating security, IT and DevOps processes with Sophos Cloud Workload Protection – available via agent or API.
- [Cloud security posture management CSPM](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/cloud-optix): Sophos Cloud Optix delivers CSPM that optimizes cloud costs and security through automated workload discovery, visualization and guided remediation.

## Email Security
- [Employee awareness training](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/phish-threat): Sophos Phish Threat educates and tests end users via automated phishing simulations to build real‑world awareness.
- [Email and phishing protection](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/sophos-email): Sophos Email prevents phishing and stops threats before they reach your inbox, providing end‑to‑end visibility, shared threat intelligence and M365 API integration.

## Endpoint Security
- [Endpoint protection - Next-gen antivirus](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/endpoint-security): Sophos Endpoint powered by Intercept X stops advanced attacks before they impact your systems and integrates EDR and XDR tools for hunting and response.
- [Endpoint detection and response EDR](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/endpoint-security/edr): Sophos EDR lets you remotely detect, investigate, and respond to advanced threats across endpoints and servers with rich forensic data.
- [Mobile security](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/mobile-control): Sophos Mobile secures iOS and Android devices, protecting corporate data and enforcing compliance across mobile endpoints.
- [Server protection](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/server-security): Sophos Server Protection defends workloads in physical, virtual, and cloud environments with advanced anti-ransomware and exploit prevention.

## Enterprise Managed Security Services
- [Incident response services IR](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/incident-response-services): Sophos Incident Response provides expert-led 24/7 investigation and containment to quickly eliminate active cyber threats and breaches.
- [Sophos Emergency Incident Response](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/incident-response-services/emergency-response): Sophos Emergency Incident Response provides incredibly fast assistance, identifying and neutralizing active threats against your organization.
- [Managed detection and response MDR](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/managed-detection-and-response): Sophos MDR combines AI-driven detection with 24/7 human threat hunting to identify, investigate, and stop attacks across endpoint, network, email, and cloud.
- [Vulnerability management - Managed Risk](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/services/managed-risk): Sophos Managed Risk continuously identifies and prioritizes vulnerabilities, providing expert guidance to reduce your organization’s attack surface.

## Network Security and Infrastructure
- [Extended detection and response XDR](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/extended-detection-and-response): Sophos XDR unifies endpoint, network, email, and cloud data into a single platform for proactive detection, investigation, and response.
- [Network detection and response NDR](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/network-detection-and-response): Sophos NDR uses AI and machine learning to detect suspicious network activity and stop threats that bypass perimeter defenses.
- [Next-gen firewall NGFW](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/next-gen-firewall): Sophos Firewall delivers next-generation protection with deep packet inspection, web filtering, IPS, VPN, and SD-WAN capabilities.
- [Xstream SD-WAN](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/next-gen-firewall/sd-wan): Sophos SD-WAN optimizes application performance and securely connects distributed sites with integrated firewall and zero-trust security.
- [Wireless access points](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/secure-wifi): Sophos Wireless Access Points provide secure, cloud-managed Wi-Fi with threat visibility and seamless integration into Sophos Central.
- [Network switches](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/sophos-switch): Sophos Switches deliver simple, secure, cloud-managed switching for campus, branch, and distributed networks.
- [Zero trust network access ZTNA](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/zero-trust-network-access): Sophos ZTNA replaces VPNs with identity-based, least-privilege access to applications, reducing risk for remote and hybrid workforces.

## Threat Intelligence Blog
- [Security blogs](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/blog): Sophos News provides timely blogs and updates from experts on the latest cyber threats, trends, and defenses.
- [AI research](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/blog?taxonomy_blog_category=AI+Research): Explore Sophos AI Research for insights into machine learning, threat detection models, and responsible use of AI in cybersecurity.
- [X-Ops threat research](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/x-ops): Sophos X-Ops unites threat researchers, data scientists, and incident responders to deliver actionable intelligence against evolving attacks.- [Sophos blog AI research](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/blog?taxonomy_blog_category=AI+Research): Sophos AI research and cyber intelligence against evolving attacks.

## Platform
- [SophosLabs Intelix - Threat intelligence](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/intelix): SophosLabs Intelix delivers cloud-based threat intelligence, malware analysis, and API access for automated security decisions.
- [Integrations marketplace](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/marketplace): The Sophos Marketplace connects you with 100+ integrations across IT, security, and business applications for unified protection.
- [Sophos Central](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/sophos-central): Sophos Central is the unified cloud management console for Sophos products, providing a single pane of glass for security operations.
- [Sophos Central Free trial](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/sophos-central/free-trial): Start a free trial of Sophos Central to experience unified management of endpoint, network, email, and cloud security.
- [Sophos AI](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/solutions/ai-cybersecurity): Sophos AI applies advanced machine learning and data science to detect, prevent, and respond to cyberattacks in real time.

## Comparison
- [Competitor comparisons](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/sophos-vs-competition): See how Sophos stacks up against competitors with head-to-head comparisons across endpoint, firewall,  and MDR.

## Complimentary Tools
- [NIS2 assessment](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/content/nis2-compliance): Use the Sophos NIS2 Assessment tool to evaluate your organization’s readiness for EU cybersecurity regulations and compliance requirements.
- [NIST assessment](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/report/nist-assessment): The Sophos NIST Cybersecurity Framework Assessment helps you measure maturity against NIST standards and identify gaps in your defenses.

## Partners
- [Sophos Partner Care](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/partners/partner-care): Sophos Partner Care provides dedicated support resources to help partners resolve issues and accelerate business growth.
- [Partner blogs](https://partnernews.sophos.com/en-us/): Stay informed with the Sophos Partner Blog, featuring updates, best practices, and insights tailored for channel partners.
- [Partner portal login](https://partners.sophos.com/): The Sophos Partner Portal gives resellers and MSPs access to tools, resources, and account management to grow their business.
- [Training and certification](https://partners.sophos.com/prm/English/c/sophos-learning-zone): Access the Sophos Learning Zone for partner-focused training, certifications, and enablement programs.
- [Sophos OEM solutions](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/oem): Sophos OEM solutions enable technology vendors to integrate Sophos security into their products for seamless protection.
- [Partner program](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/partners): Join the Sophos Partner Program to expand your cybersecurity offerings, increase profitability, and access world-class support.
- [Managed service providers](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/partners/managed-service-providers): Sophos MSP Connect simplifies delivery of managed security services with flexible licensing, automation, and 24/7 protection.

## Professional Services
- [Operational support](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/support/professional-services): Sophos Professional Services help you design, deploy, and optimize cybersecurity solutions with expert guidance and support.

- [Awards and recognition](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/company/recognition): Explore Sophos’ industry awards and analyst recognitions for leadership in endpoint, firewall, MDR, and more.
- [Industry recognition](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/content/why-sophos/recognition/sophos-industry-recognition): Sophos top industry recognition from users and analyst for leadership in enterprise endpoint, firewall, and MDR platform.

- [Addressing the Cybersecurity Skills Shortage in SMBs](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/content/addressing-the-cybersecurity-skills-shortage-in-smbs): Learn how SMBs can close the cybersecurity skills gap with managed detection and response services.
- [Top Six Advantages of ZTNA](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/content/advantages-of-ztna): Discover the top six advantages of Zero Trust Network Access over traditional VPNs.
- [Cybersecurity Tabletop Exercise Guide](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/content/cybersecurity-tabletop-exercise): Learn how to run effective cybersecurity tabletop exercises to test and improve incident response.
- [2024 Gartner Peer Insights Voice of the Customer MDR Report](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/content/gartner-voice-of-customer-mdr): Sophos named a Customers’ Choice for Managed Detection and Response in Gartner Peer Insights.
- [MSP Perspectives 2024](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/content/msp-perspectives): Explore how managed service providers view the rise of AI in cybersecurity and its impact on operations.
- [Navigating the AI Hype in Cybersecurity](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/content/navigating-the-ai-hype-in-cybersecurity): Understand the realities of AI in cybersecurity beyond the hype.
- [Enhancing Security Operations with NDR](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/content/ndr-enhancing-security-operations): Learn how Sophos Network Detection and Response strengthens SOC efficiency and visibility.
- [Securing Financial Service Providers Against Cyberthreats](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/content/secure-financial-service-providers-against-cyberthreats): See how Sophos helps financial services organizations defend against ransomware and advanced attacks.

## Awareness and Education
- [What Is Extended Detection and Response (XDR)?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/what-is-xdr-security): Learn how XDR unifies security data to improve detection, investigation, and response.
- [What is Sophos?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/what-is-sophos): Sophos is a global cybersecurity leader providing endpoint, network, MDR, and cloud security as a service.
- [What Is Zero Trust Security?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/what-is-zero-trust-security): Zero Trust requires continuous verification of users and devices to reduce attack risk.
- [What Is a Hardened Server?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/what-is-server-hardening): Learn how server hardening minimizes attack surface by eliminating unnecessary services and enforcing security controls.
- [What Is Vulnerability Management?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/what-is-vulnerability-management): Vulnerability management identifies, prioritizes, and remediates weaknesses to reduce cyber risk.
- [What Is the NIS2 Directive?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/what-is-the-nis2-directive-faqs): Learn about the EU NIS2 Directive and what it means for cybersecurity compliance.
- [What Is Endpoint Security?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/what-is-endpoint-security): Endpoint security protects laptops, desktops, and mobile devices from malware and cyberattacks.
- [What Is Cybersecurity as a Service?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/what-is-cybersecurity-as-a-service-csaas): Cybersecurity-as-a-Service (CSaaS) delivers outsourced security management through cloud-based services.
- [What Is NGAV - Next-Generation Antivirus?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/what-is-ngav): NGAV stops advanced malware and exploits that traditional antivirus often misses.
- [What Is Cyber Insurance?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/what-is-cyber-insurance): Explore the benefits of cyber insurance and how strong defenses can lower premiums.
- [What Is MDR - Managed Detection and Response?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/what-is-mdr): MDR combines technology and human expertise to detect and respond to threats 24/7.
- [What Are the Types of Cyber Threat Actors?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/threat-actors): Learn about cybercriminals, hacktivists, nation-states, and insider threats.
- [What Is a VPN?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/vpn): A VPN encrypts connections and helps secure remote access.
- [What Is Threat Hunting?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/threat-hunting): Threat hunting proactively searches for hidden threats that bypass automated defenses.
- [What Is SCADA Security?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/scada-network-security): SCADA security protects critical infrastructure against cyberattacks.
- [What Is Network Telemetry?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/telemetry): Network telemetry data provides visibility into cyber risks and attack activity.
- [What Is SECaaS - Security as a Service?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/secaas): SECaaS delivers outsourced, cloud-based security capabilities on demand.
- [What Is SASE - Secure Access Service Edge?](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/sase-secure-access-service-edge): SASE combines SD-WAN with cloud-delivered security services for modern networks.- [Cyber security jobs](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/cyber-security-jobs-and-rolls): Cybersecurity specialists protect an organization’s digital environment by identifying vulnerabilities, strengthening security controls, and responding quickly to emerging threats.- [What is Identity Threat Detection and Response (ITDR)](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/cybersecurity-explained/itdr-identity-threat-detection-response): Identities have become the new frontline of cyber defense. With the shift to cloud and remote work, the traditional network perimeter has dissolved, creating new attack surfaces that are difficult to monitor and secure.

## Small and Medium Business
- [Cybersecurity for small business](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/small-and-medium-business): Sophos helps SMBs stop ransomware and cyberattacks with enterprise-grade security made simple.
- [Endpoint demo](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/small-and-medium-business/endpoint-demo): Experience a live demo of Sophos Endpoint protection for SMBs.
- [Endpoint pricing](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/small-and-medium-business/endpoint-get-pricing): Request pricing for Sophos Endpoint security for SMBs.
- [Firewall demo](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/small-and-medium-business/firewall-demo): See a demo of Sophos Firewall and how it protects small and medium businesses.
- [Firewall pricing](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/small-and-medium-business/firewall-get-pricing): Get pricing for Sophos Firewall solutions for SMBs.
- [MDR contact request](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/small-and-medium-business/mdr-
- [MDR pricing](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/small-and-medium-business/mdr-get-pricing): Get pricing for Sophos Managed Detection and Response tailored for small businesses.

## Sophos Home Antivirus
- [Sophos Home](https://home.sophos.com/en-us): Protect personal PCs and Macs with the same advanced security trusted by enterprises worldwide.
- [Mac antivirus download](https://home.sophos.com/en-us/download-mac-security): Download Sophos Home Premium for Mac to block malware, ransomware, and phishing.
- [PC antivirus download](https://home.sophos.com/en-us/download-pc-security): Download Sophos Home Premium for Windows PCs for complete antivirus and web protection.

## Learning and Support
- [Support portal](https://support.sophos.com/support/s/): Access technical support, knowledge base, and case management in the Sophos Support Portal.
- [Submit a threat](https://support.sophos.com/support/s/filesubmission): Submit suspicious files to SophosLabs for analysis.
- [Sophos Techvids](https://techvids.sophos.com/): Watch short training and troubleshooting videos to get the most from your Sophos products.
- [Sophos Customer Success](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/support/customer-success): Maximize your investment with resources from the Sophos Customer Success team.
- [Downloads and updates](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/support/downloads): Download installers, firmware, and updates for Sophos products.
- [Technical Account Manager (TAM)](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/support/technical-account-manager): TAM services provide proactive guidance and personalized support from Sophos experts.
- [Sophos Academy](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/training): Access training courses and certifications to build cybersecurity expertise.

## Product Support Community
- [Sophos community forums](https://community.sophos.com/): Join discussions, ask questions, and share knowledge in the Sophos Community.
- [Sophos Endpoint Community](https://community.sophos.com/intercept-x-endpoint/): Peer support and resources for Sophos Endpoint users.
- [Sophos Central Community](https://community.sophos.com/sophos-central/): Learn and share best practices for Sophos Central management.
- [Sophos Email Community](https://community.sophos.com/sophos-email/): Community support for Sophos Email security solutions.
- [Sophos XDR Community](https://community.sophos.com/sophos-xdr/): Resources and discussion for extended detection and response users.
- [Sophos Firewall Community](https://community.sophos.com/sophos-xg-firewall/): Connect with peers and experts about Sophos Firewall.

## Resources and Use Cases
- [Sophos Resources](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/resources): Access, webinars, case studies, whitepapers, podcasts and reports across all products categories.
- [Case studies](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/company/case-studies): Review case studies showcasing Sophos success across industries.
- [Protect my Microsoft environment](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/products/managed-detection-and-response/microsoft-defender): Learn how Sophos MDR strengthens Microsoft Defender environments with 24/7 threat hunting.
- [All solutions](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/solutions): Browse all Sophos solutions for endpoint, network, cloud, email, and MDR.
- [Education](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/solutions/industries/education): Safeguard students, staff, and data with Sophos cybersecurity for education.
- [Finance and banking](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/solutions/industries/finance-and-banking): Protect financial institutions with robust, compliant cybersecurity solutions.
- [Government](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/solutions/industries/government): Protect government IT environments and sensitive data with Sophos’ adaptive cybersecurity.
- [Healthcare](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/solutions/industries/healthcare): Sophos secures healthcare organizations against ransomware and compliance risks.
- [Manufacturing](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/solutions/industries/manufacturing): Safeguard manufacturing operations and intellectual property with Sophos industrial cybersecurity.
- [Retail](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/solutions/industries/retail): Sophos helps retailers defend against ransomware, fraud, and point-of-sale attacks.
- [Neutralize threats 24/7](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/solutions/neutralize-threats): Neutralize threats around the clock with Sophos MDR security services.
- [Address cyber insurance requirements](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/solutions/use-cases/cyber-insurance): Address cyber insurance compliance and reduce premiums with strong controls.
- [Stop ransomware attacks](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/solutions/use-cases/ransomware-protection): Protect against ransomware with multilayered Sophos defenses.
- [Protect my remote or hybrid employees](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/solutions/use-cases/remote-working): Secure remote and hybrid employees with Sophos Zero Trust and endpoint protection.
- [Comply with the latest regulations](https://www.sophos.com/en-us/solutions#compliance): Use Sophos solutions to help meet compliance mandates and regulatory requirements.
